gallibier then the telegraph a little bit of that some of the cred to square all of the call de la quad affair and then a long downhill run to take on the day's final test up to virginia well this the catch this man and in the end the answer was no carlos verona wonderful likewise you might say primus roglic who goes into the yellow jersey the first pro will win for verona meant so much as he crossed the line magnificent for the movie star man great for his team as well but a great performance by roglic and jumbo visma they just missed out on the stage but lead overall now with roglic it was to be a rueful tip of the head by jonas finger go in an interview afterwards kind of indicated he might have gone for the stage win himself not to be ben o'connor crossing the line and all the plaudits though raining down upon the head of our great winner today third win for a breakaway on this great race the dofini never disappoints carlos verona doing it for the brave once again margin of 13 seconds over a row glitch that's how it's shaped up chavez goddau menkes gegenhart jack hague also in the frame well the advantage going into the final day for primos raw glitches a margin of 44 at hand good performance by tao gigenhart and caruso up there as well the dofinae rolls on and our jerseys separately owned roglich in yellow pierrot along with two all category climbs today is dealt with before we even get there it's going to be hell again but joy for cycling fans i am certain everywhere this amazing race the ultimate prep for the tour de france is living up to its reputation spectacular racing and it rolls on for one more day tomorrow you
